hypothesis: A curiosity-gap headline combined with savings-focused stats will outperform the current setup by triggering FOMO and anchoring value with a concrete dollar amount.

changes.headline: The Chrome Extension PayPal Doesn't Want You to Know About

rationale.headline: Curiosity gap + implied controversy. Positions CouponSnap as the scrappy underdog vs PayPal (billion-dollar corporation). Tests whether provocation outperforms straightforward benefit. Risk: may feel clickbait-y — monitoring bounce rate.
rationale.social_proof_stats: Replacing '$0 Cost to You, Ever' with a concrete savings figure ($127/year) gives visitors a reason to care. Dollar amounts are more motivating than cost-avoidance framing.
